ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the academic program */,
  "accreditation_body" TEXT /* Accreditation body for the program */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fee_structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition and fee structure */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the structure becomes effective */,
  "tuition_per_hour" REAL /* Tuition cost per academic hour */,
  "required_fee_per_hour" REAL /* Required fees per academic hour */,
  "coe_fee_per_hour" REAL /* College of Engineering (COE) program enhancement fee per academic hour */,
  "technology_fee_per_hour" REAL /* Technology fee per academic hour */,
  "student_services_fee_per_hour" REAL /* Student services fee per academic hour */,
  "library_fee_per_hour" REAL /* Library fee per academic hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_fee_structures_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the program */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  "student_status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., active, graduated) */,
  "student_type" TEXT /* Type of student (e.g., full-time, part-time, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment */,
  "enrolled_hours" INTEGER /* Number of academic hours enrolled */,
  "total_tuition" REAL /* Total tuition cost */,
  "total_required_fees" REAL /* Total required fees */,
  "total_coe_fees" REAL /* Total COE program enhancement fees */,
  "total_technology_fees" REAL /* Total technology fees */,
  "total_student_services_fees" REAL /* Total student services fees */,
  "total_library_fees" REAL /* Total library fees */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost for the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid application */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "amount_requested" REAL /* Amount of financial aid requested */,
  "amount_awarded" REAL /* Amount of financial aid awarded */,
  "application_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the financial aid application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "payment_reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid_types" (
  "aid_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid type */,
  "aid_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial aid type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial aid type */,
  "loan_interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for loans */,
  "scholarship_renewability" TEXT /* Renewability status for scholarships */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid detail */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial aid application */,
  "aid_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial aid type */,
  "amount_awarded" REAL /* Amount of financial aid awarded for this type */,
  "award_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial aid award */,
  "award_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial aid award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_details_aid_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("aid_type_id") REFERENCES financial_aid_types ("aid_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_details_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES financial_aid_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor */,
  "appointment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the instructor's appointment */,
  "appointment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the instructor's appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program the course belongs to */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "course_prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fee_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition and fee history record */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tuition and fee structure */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the structure became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the structure ended */,
  "tuition_per_hour" REAL /* Tuition cost per academic hour */,
  "required_fee_per_hour" REAL /* Required fees per academic hour */,
  "coe_fee_per_hour" REAL /* College of Engineering (COE) program enhancement fee per academic hour */,
  "technology_fee_per_hour" REAL /* Technology fee per academic hour */,
  "student_services_fee_per_hour" REAL /* Student services fee per academic hour */,
  "library_fee_per_hour" REAL /* Library fee per academic hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_fee_histories_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES tuition_fee_structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "requirement_value" TEXT /* Value or threshold for the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid_requirements_met" (
  "requirement_met_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement met record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial aid application */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial aid requirement */,
  "met_status" TEXT /* Status indicating whether the requirement was met (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "evidence_submitted" TEXT /* Evidence submitted to meet the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_met_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_requirements_met_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES financial_aid_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_requirements_met_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES financial_aid_requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
